name: write_mem_info
short_description: Write the Memory Map Info of the design to a .mmi file.
full_help:
write_mem_info

Description: 
Write the Memory Map Info of the design to a .mmi file.

Syntax: 
write_mem_info  [-cell <arg>] [-no_partial_mmi] [-force_detect_xpm] [-force]
                [-quiet] [-verbose] <file>

Returns: 
The name of the .mmi file

Usage: 
  Name                 Description
  --------------------------------
  [-cell]              Create only partial .mmi for named cell
  [-no_partial_mmi]    Do not write partial bit files for a Dynamic Function 
                       eXchange design
  [-force_detect_xpm]  Traverse netlist and check for XPM
  [-force]             Overwrite existing mem info xml file
  [-quiet]             Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]           Suspend message limits during command execution
  <file>               Design mem info file
                       Values: A filename with alphanumeric characters and 
                       .mmi extension.

Categories: 
FileIO
